summary: Project Package Materials Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright. Fixed a critical bug where useEffect for loading materials was in wrong component scope.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: useEffect for loadProjectMaterials was incorrectly placed inside PaymentSummarySection component (line 97-100) where projectData, projectMaterialsLoaded, and loadProjectMaterials were not in scope. Moved to main ProjectDetail component after useAutoRefresh.
Backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/package-materials returns saved materials list correctly
Backend: PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/package-materials saves materials with proper role permissions (SUPER_ADMIN, PROJECT_MANAGER, CRE, PLANNING)
Frontend: Materials List section (data-testid='pkg-materials-section') shows when project has package_id
Frontend: Package badge displays package name next to 'Materials List' header
Frontend: Editable inputs for Material Name (data-testid='proj-mat-name-{idx}') and Brand (data-testid='proj-mat-brand-{idx}')
Frontend: Add Material button (data-testid='add-project-material') adds new empty row
Frontend: Delete button (data-testid='proj-mat-delete-{idx}') removes material row
Frontend: Auto-save with 600ms debounce works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test project proj_2d500929fbe9 has pre-saved materials: [{name:'Cement', brand:'UltraTech'}, {name:'Steel', brand:'TATA'}]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Package Materials feature is fully functional. When a project has a package_id, the Materials tab shows a 'Materials List' section with editable rows for Material Name and Brand. Users can add/edit/delete materials, and changes auto-save with 600ms debounce. Test project: proj_2d500929fbe9 (has package pkg_ef0f77f2). The useEffect for loading materials was fixed - it was incorrectly placed in PaymentSummarySection component.

bug_fixed.issue: useEffect for loadProjectMaterials was in wrong component scope
bug_fixed.fix: Moved useEffect to main ProjectDetail component after useAutoRefresh (line 573)
bug_fixed.root_cause: The useEffect was referencing projectData, projectMaterialsLoaded, and loadProjectMaterials which are defined in the parent ProjectDetail component, not in PaymentSummarySection
